expertise.summary: Data science and analytics professional with experience in team management, advanced analytics, and data science open-source platforms

responsibilities: Retain and recruit a large and growing data science, analytics and engineering team
Create a virtuous cycle of platform adoption with improved data insights and streamlined publishing/access
Drive revenue and cost optimization decisions and experiment ideas with business leaders based on data insights
Building & managing a large analytics team, working cross-functionally, and managing vendor relationships and contracts
Hands on experience in advanced analytics, Machine Learning and data science open-source platforms such as R and Python along with DW platforms such as Hana, Hadoop
